summary: Verified the BUG FIX for footer disclaimer alignment on Advalora Consulting landing page. Tested visually + with bounding-box measurements at 1920px, 1366px and 768px viewports. The disclaimer block (data-testid='footer-disclaimer') now perfectly aligns with the rest of the footer content and all sections of the page. No console errors observed.

desktop_1920x1080.note: Disclaimer sits inside the 40px (lg:px-10) padding of footer inner — i.e. fully spans the content width as expected. No premature right-cropping.

tablet_768x1024.note: On tablet, px-6 (24px) padding is applied. Disclaimer correctly fills the container minus that padding.

page_wide_alignment_audit_at_1920px.hero_outer: left=0, right=1920 (full-bleed background wrapper — expected; content inside is constrained)
page_wide_alignment_audit_at_1920px.result: All section containers share the same x-coordinate. No rogue offsets detected.

verification_details.console_errors: None observed (no React warnings, no missing images, no font loading errors)

critical_code_review_comments: Landing.jsx is 1213 lines — exceeds the recommended 700-line threshold. Consider splitting Footer, Hero, Services, FAQ, ContactForm, etc. into separate files under /app/frontend/src/components/landing/ for maintainability. Not blocking, but worth scheduling.
Footer inner padding is lg:px-10 (40px) on desktop. The disclaimer correctly inherits this — alignment is now consistent with every other section.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for footer disclaimer alignment is fully verified at 3 viewport widths. All page sections share identical horizontal alignment under the mx-auto max-w-7xl px-6 lg:px-10 container. No console errors. No further action required for this iteration.
